clubscan.description: A modern web application for sports clubs to manage their member attendances. Features include offline support, real-time updates, and a user-friendly interface for tracking attendance and generating reports.

portfolio.description: A modern, responsive portfolio website built with Next.js 14, featuring smooth animations, 3D elements, and a dark mode. Showcases my projects and experience in web development.
